Test Title: Verify page loads with navigation bar

Scenario Type: Navigation bar displays with NexusAI logo, 4 navigation links (Chat Hub active), Language selector, Sign In, Get Started buttons

Test Title: Verify left sidebar displays model list

Scenario Type: Left sidebar shows search input "Search 400+ models..." and scrollable list of AI models with icons, names, and lab badges
Only models containing "claude" in name or lab are displayed in the model list

Test Title: Verify model selection updates active model
Test Steps: 1. Click on a different model in the list

Test Title: Model: Any model different from current
Scenario Type: Right sidebar updates to show selected model details, chat context changes to new model

Test Title: Verify guest session banner displays for non-logged users

Scenario Type: Guest session banner appears showing "Guest session - X remaining" with "Save permanently ->" button linking to /auth/signup

Test Title: Verify welcome state displays when no messages
Preconditions: Fresh chat session with no messages
Test Steps: 1. Check chat area when no messages exist

Scenario Type: Center area displays model icon, "Chat with [Model Name]" heading, and model description

Test ID: 2. Click Send button or press Enter
Layer: User message appears in chat stream, typing indicator shows, AI response appears after delay

Test Title: Verify Enter key sends message without Shift

Scenario Type: Message sends immediately without line break
Cursor moves to new line without sending message

Test Steps: 1. Check if prompt suggestions panel appears

Scenario Type: Panel displays with tabs (use_cases, etc.) and clickable prompt suggestions

Test Title: Verify clicking prompt suggestion sends message
Test Steps: 1. Click on a prompt suggestion button

Scenario Type: Selected prompt appears in input and sends automatically
Microphone icon shows recording state, spoken text appears in input field

Test Title: Verify voice input stops on second click

Scenario Type: Recording stops, text remains in input field

Preconditions: At least one assistant message exists

Scenario Type: Last assistant message is read aloud using browser SpeechSynthesis API
Camera modal opens showing live video feed with Capture and Cancel buttons
Photo captures, attaches to message as image attachment, camera modal closes
Camera modal closes without attaching photo
Recording button shows red state with timer counting, audio records

Test Title: Verify voice recording attaches on stop
Test Steps: 1. Click voice recording button to stop

Scenario Type: Recording stops, audio file attaches to message with duration label
Video recorder modal opens with live feed and Start Recording/Cancel buttons
Button changes to "Stop & Attach", red REC indicator with timer appears

Test Title: Verify video recording attaches on stop

Scenario Type: Recording stops, video file attaches to message with duration label

Test Title: Verify file upload attaches multiple files

Scenario Type: Selected files display as attachment thumbnails below input
Attachment removes from pending attachments list
Message sends with both text and attachment visible in chat stream

Test Title: Verify guest session persists across refresh

Scenario Type: Previous messages and guest session state restore correctly

Test Title: Verify guest session expires after 3 hours

Scenario Type: System shows "Guest session expired (3 hours limit). Please sign up to continue chatting." message

Test Title: Verify right sidebar model details display

Scenario Type: Sidebar shows model icon, name, organization, tags, description, context, rating, price, reviews
Usage overview chart shows activity bars updated with recent message timestamps

Test Title: Verify quick action buttons send messages
Quick action: Any from right sidebar
Scenario Type: Clicked quick action text appears as sent message

Test Steps: 1. Click Sign In button in navbar
1. Click Get Started button in navbar

Scenario Type: Send button remains disabled (greyed out), no message sends
Send button remains disabled, no message sends

Test Title: Verify invalid model ID in URL query

Scenario Type: System falls back to default model or first available model

Test Title: Verify network error on message send

Scenario Type: System displays "I could not reach the chat service. Please try again." message

Test ID: 2. Deny camera permission in browser dialog
Scenario Type: System shows "Camera access denied." alert, camera modal does not open

Test ID: 2. Deny microphone permission in browser dialog
Scenario Type: System shows "Voice input not supported in this browser." or permission denied alert

Test Steps: 1. Try to use voice input in unsupported browser
Expected Result: System shows "Voice input not supported in this browser." alert
Each message shows timestamp in HH:MM:SS format below message content

Scenario Type: Three-dot typing indicator animates (dots pulse sequentially) while waiting for AI response
Chat stream automatically scrolls to show newest message

Test Title: Model: Any model with badge property
Scenario Type: Badge appears on model in sidebar and in right sidebar details
Language selection updates, potentially changes text direction for RTL languages
Panel opens/closes based on current state
Video recorder modal closes without attaching video

Preconditions: Each attachment displays appropriate icon and type label

Expected Result: User message has accent background, white text, rounded corners with different radius pattern, right-aligned
Assistant message has white background, dark text, border, shadow, left-aligned with model icon
